sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112403" key="frugani/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φρῡγᾰν-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n112403.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gather firewood,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:142" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.142</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
